stemHtml: What are the most effective measures to take to reduce the effects of low humidity on the human body (the eyes and skin)?

options.a: Drink water and clean the face with water, paying special attention to the eyes.
options.b: Use eye drops and apply an oil-based skin cream before take-off.
options.c: Drink water, use hydrating eye drops, and apply aqueous creams.
options.d: Increase the level of the air conditioning
